content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-034)

## Headline
**1.1.2 `H_tensor_invertible` CLOSED** (sorry 3→2, axiom-flat). The 4-iter monoidal strand is DONE. 4th §1 deep theorem closed (1.4@017, 1.2@022, 1.3@030, 1.1.2@034). **2 sorries left:** `H_tensor` (1.1.3, L1893), `ext_finite_flat` (1.10, L1928).

## Closest-to-completion / next target
- **1.1.3 `H_tensor` (Eilenberg–Watts), L1893** — the natural next lane. It is now **un-gated** by the completed naturality layer (the whole point of opening the monoidal strand @031: `tensorRight`/`tensorAssocNatIso₁₂₃`/`tensorRearrangeNatIso`/`tensorRightEquivOfInvertible` are reusable substrate). Planner should scope the EW route against the paper (AK §1.1.3) and check which of the built NatIsos feed it before dispatch. NOTE: this was previously infra-blocked (Eilenberg–Watts); re-assess now that the bifunctor + per-variable naturality layer exists.
- **1.10 `ext_finite_flat` (relExt), L1928** — STILL infra-blocked (R^q f_* + internal ℰxt absent; overlaps the PAUSED internal-ℰxt strand). Do NOT dispatch without first landing that strand. Plan agent should NOT re-assign as a quick lane.

## Coverage debt (MANDATORY — planner to blueprint next iter)
`archon dag-query unmatched` = **2** `lean_aux`, both new this iter (the @034 planner pre-authored the other 6 STEP-D decls). Author blueprint blocks + wire `\uses`:
- **`tensorRightMapIso {X} {L₁ L₂} (e : L₁ ≅ L₂) : tensorRight L₁ ≅ tensorRight L₂`** — "whisker an object iso into `tensorRight`"; component `(tensorLeft A).mapIso e`; naturality = tensor interchange (`whisker_exchange`). Deps: `def:tensorRight`, `lem:tensorRight_map_eq`/`lem:tensorLeft_map_eq`. Used by `tensorRightEquivOfInvertible`.
- **`tensorLeftUnitorNatIso {X} : tensorLeft 𝒪_X ≅ 𝟭`** — left unitor as natural iso; naturality = presheaf `leftUnitor_naturality` + sheafification-counit naturality. Deps: `lem:tensorMod_unitor` (`tensorLeftUnitor`), `def:moduleSheafification`, `presheafLeftUnitor`, `sheafifyValIso`. Used by `tensorRightUnitorNatIso`.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered (added to PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- **Term-mode reassociation across the sheafification boundary** — on sheafification naturality goals `rw`/`simp`/`reassoc_of%`/`slice_lhs` ALL silently fail to match `≫` (non-syntactic `CategoryStruct`/instance path). CLOSE by a pure term-mode `Eq.trans` chain (`(Category.assoc _ _ _).symm.trans ((congrArg (· ≫ e) step).trans …)`). This is THE linchpin trick for the unitor/equivalence layer.
- **First-factor associator-naturality mirror** — `assocIdx*₁`'s fixed second slot must be `tensorHom (𝟙 L)(𝟙 L')` (NOT `𝟙 (tensorObj L L')`) so `associator_naturality φ (𝟙 L)(𝟙 L')` matches definitionally; avoids a non-defeq id-bridge.
- **Tensor interchange via `whisker_exchange`** — `ext1 Z; simp only [tensorHom_app, comp_app, id_app]; exact (MonoidalCategory.whisker_exchange _ _).symm` (NOT `tensorHom_comp_tensorHom`, which doesn't fire on `PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorHom`).
- **Invertible-object equivalence cheaply** — `Equivalence.mk` needs NO triangle/coherence; assemble unit/counit from the unitor + map + first-factor-associator NatIsos. Then `homTensorFunctor` twist via `isoWhiskerRight/Left` + the equivalence's `fullyFaithfulFunctor` + `coyoneda.preimageIso`.

## Do-NOT-retry
- Do NOT re-attempt sheafification-square reassociation via `rw`/`simp`/`reassoc_of%`/`slice_lhs` — confirmed silently-non-matching (defeq instance path); always term-mode.
- Do NOT reopen the 1.1.2 lane — it is complete and axiom-flat. No remaining gap.

## Housekeeping (non-blocking)
- `External.lfp_free_at_point_locallyFree` (authored @029, unused) remains a prune candidate (user-only `archon-protected.yaml` / blueprint).
- The 22 `External.*` re-flag every iter (intentional boundary). To silence the doctor, user can list them in `archon-protected.yaml` (YAML is user-only).
